docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY BOWEN, SUSAN AS TO DEFENDANT FENG, CONNIE (DRIVER & REGISTERED OWNER) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-09-2013 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BOWEN, SUSAN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT FENG, CONNIE (DRIVER & REGISTERED OWNER) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-09-2013 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $85.00 - SERVED MAY-25-2013, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT FENG, CONNIE (DRIVER & REGISTERED OWNER)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-09-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-09-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAS ASSISTED BY CANTONESE INTERPRETER---TERRANCE CHOY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
